APP_TAGLINE: Real-time ambilight for Skydimo LED strips
APP_DESCRIPTION: Desktop ambilight app for Skydimo LED strips with screen sync, color control, gradients, animations, and USB auto-detection.
APP_DESCRIPTION_LONG: Control Skydimo LED strips from your PC with real-time screen ambilight, solid colors, gradients, per-LED painting, animations, zone calibration, and one-click USB connect.
